node_6.subject: Latoya Williams
node_6.description: This is Latoya Williams's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, have breakfast from 8:00 am to 8:30 am, spend time organizing and editing photos from her recent travels from 8:30 am to 12:00 pm, take a break for lunch at 12:00 pm and engage in conversations with other artists about the upcoming local mayor election until 1:00 pm, continue working on her photography series from 1:00 pm to 4:00 pm, focusing on how to present her work effectively, have a short break and grab a snack from 4:00 pm to 4:30 pm, meet with other creatives in the co-living space to discuss project ideas and potential collaborations from 4:30 pm to 5:30 pm, have dinner at 5:30 pm.
